title: Bed Bug Treatment in Somers, NY | $1,200 - $3,500

intro: Dealing with bed bugs in Somers requires immediate professional intervention to prevent these persistent pests from spreading throughout your home. Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive bed bug treatment services to Somers residents, utilizing advanced heat treatment and chemical solutions tailored to your specific infestation. Our experienced technicians serve all neighborhoods in Somers, from historic homes near the Elephant Hotel to modern residences throughout this scenic Westchester community.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC brings over 15 years of bed bug elimination experience to Somers homeowners, with a proven track record of complete eradication using EPA-approved methods and cutting-edge thermal remediation technology. We offer free inspections, same-day service availability, and a comprehensive warranty that ensures your Somers home remains bed bug-free long after treatment.
localContext: Somers' mix of older colonial homes, lakeside properties near Muscoot Reservoir, and family residences can all be vulnerable to bed bug infestations brought in through travel, vintage furniture, or visitors. Our technicians are familiar with the unique architectural characteristics of Somers properties and customize treatment plans to protect your home's integrity while completely eliminating bed bugs from every room, crack, and crevice.

faqs.question: How much does bed bug treatment cost in Somers, NY?
faqs.answer: Bed bug treatment in Somers typically ranges from $1,200 to $3,500, depending on the size of your home, severity of the infestation, and treatment method required. A studio apartment may cost around $1,200, while larger homes with extensive infestations can reach $3,500 or more. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any work.

faqs.question: What bed bug treatment methods do you use in Somers?
faqs.answer: We offer both heat treatment and chemical treatment options for Somers residents. Heat treatment raises room temperatures to 135°F to kill bed bugs at all life stages in a single day, while our EPA-approved chemical treatments involve targeted applications over multiple visits. Our technicians will recommend the most effective approach based on your specific situation and property type.

faqs.question: How long does bed bug treatment take in Somers homes?
faqs.answer: Heat treatment typically takes 6-8 hours and eliminates bed bugs in one day, though you'll need to vacate during treatment. Chemical treatments require 2-3 visits spaced 10-14 days apart to target all life cycles. Most Somers homeowners can return to normal activities within 4-6 hours after chemical application, and we provide detailed preparation and aftercare instructions.

faqs.question: Do you guarantee your bed bug treatment in Somers?
faqs.answer: Yes, we provide a comprehensive warranty on all bed bug treatments in Somers. Our guarantee includes follow-up inspections and re-treatment if bed bugs return within the warranty period, provided you follow our preparation and prevention guidelines. We stand behind our work and won't consider the job complete until your Somers home is completely bed bug-free.
